debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
w : ℕ
args : Vector (ZMod p) w
cs : Clap.Cs p (ZMod p)
i : ℕ
h : i < w
h' : ¬args[i] = 0
h'' : ¬args[i] = 1
⊢ Clap.Cs.eval p inst✝ (Clap.assert_bits_e p inst✝ (ZMod p) w args cs) = denotation.n

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
exact Or.inl h'
  clear hb
  revert cs
  induction w with
  | zero =>
      intro cs
      exfalso
      simpa using h
  | succ w ih =>
      intro cs
      by_cases hi : i = 0
      · subst hi
        simp [assert_bits_e, Vector.foldl, assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, Exp.eval, h', h'']
      · have hi' : i - 1 < w := by
          have : i ≥ 1 := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hi)
          exact Nat.sub_lt_iff_lt_add'.2 (by simpa [Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using h)
        have htail : ¬ assert_bits (args.extract 1) := by
          unfold assert_bits
          simp only [Vector.all_eq_true, not_forall]
          refine ⟨i - 1, hi', ?_⟩
          have : args.extract 1 (i - 1) = args[i] := by
            simp [Vector.getElem_extract, hi, Nat.succ_eq_add_one, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm,
              Nat.add_assoc, Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.succ_le_iff.2 (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hi))]
          have hne : ¬ (args.extract 1 (i - 1) = 0 ∨ args.extract 1 (i - 1) = 1) := by
            intro hor
            rcases hor with h0 | h1
            · exact h' (by simpa [this] using h0)
            · exact h'' (by simpa [this] using h1)
          simpa [beq_iff_eq, Bool.decide_or, Bool.or_eq_true, decide_eq_true_eq, this] using hne
        have := ih (w := w) (args := args.extract 1) (cs := Cs.eq0 (Exp.v args.head * (Exp.c 1 - Exp.v args.head)) cs) htail
        simp [assert_bits_e, Vector.foldl, assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, this]
